artPrompt: A sun-warmed town green at the height of a rally, a tide of ordinary townsfolk drifting toward folding tables of casseroles, picket fences softening into haze, blank lawn placards leaning like reeds; raised hands and tilted hats catch golden afternoon light, the crowd dissolving at its edges into a tender churn of leafy green and ivory, half wholesome gathering, half gentle mob, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Roll Call of the Block
text: Roll a six-sided die. (Yes, your rival mayor rolls these constantly. Two can play.) Create that many 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens. If you control Petunia Pitchfork, roll two dice and use the higher result.
flavorText: "Present!" "Present!" "...present?" "Dale, you said present twice." "I contain multitudes."
